name: Bwp Group
analysis: BWP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$3.9000, stop A$3.6234, target A$4.7298 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
